title: Mobile Stack Manifest
description: Per-variant stack declaration and verify contract consumed by `oma verify mobile` and agent structured lookup.

language.description: Primary implementation language of the variant.

framework.description: Primary UI framework (e.g., swiftui, flutter, react-native).

ui.description: UI toolkit or paradigm (e.g., swiftui, material3, react-native).

http_client.description: HTTP transport client (e.g., urlsession, dio, axios).

data_fetching.description: Server-state / data-fetching layer where distinct from the raw HTTP client (e.g., tanstack-query).

local_storage.description: Durable on-device persistence (e.g., swiftdata, drift, mmkv).

api_spec.description: Relative path to the OpenAPI document consumed by the generator (e.g., Core/Networking/openapi.yaml).

response_cache.description: Repository-layer response cache library used to memoize decoded API models (e.g., hyperoslo-cache).

source.description: Origin marker. `variant` = shipped with repo, `migrated` = produced by legacy migration, `user` = hand-customized, `detected` = generated by the stack-set workflow from codebase detection.
